rationale: Re-assert each consequence of the conjoined `put_spec` hypothesis as a tautological implication: `put_spec` unfolds to `new_v == old_v.insert(key, value)`, so both `post*_self_.epmap@` are pinned to the same `pre_self_.epmap@.insert(src@, value)` term — added directly, transitively chained, and via `=~=` for `Map` extensionality — plus the trivial `r1 == r2` on the unit type. This hands z3 a single named version of every cross-run equality so the triggers from the two `put_spec` instances line up without re-instantiating `Map::insert`.
